name: Spaceman Escape Adventure
description: Spaceman Escape Adventure is an addictive space adventure game. Help the isolated astronauts in space successfully get the key, open the door, and escape successfully. Be careful with the current, if you hit it, you will start right back where you started. The portal is a sign that you have reached your goal and you can pass the level. Are you ready for the challenge?
tags: 2D, Action, Android, Avoid, Collecting, H5, Obstacle
